Links Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) Data with Activity Data

Source: R/linkingFunctions.R
cgmactivityLink.Rd

Creates a dataset containing CGM data matched with activity data: for each CGM timestamp, mean step count and/or heart rate is available

Usage

cgmactivityLink(CgmDataFrame, ActivityDataFrame, DataType)

Arguments

CgmDataFrame

A dataframe containing CGM data. Must have columns id, cgm_timestamp, glucose.

ActivityDataFrame

A dataframe containing Fitbit step count or heart rate data.

DataType

Character object determining which data to process. 2 options available: "stepcount" or "heartrate".

Value

A dataset where for each CGM timestamp there is a corresponding step count or mean heart rate.

Examples


if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
hypometrics::cgmactivityLink(CgmDataFrame,
                             ActivityDataFrame,
                             DataType)
} # }
